subject: Re: Farkas: Something I said?
body:
anytime Tuesday

--- Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com> wrote:

> So, I shower, I shave, I put on cologne and my
> hottest lingerie, but still
> you don't call, you don't write. I am in southampton
> until tomorrow
> afternoon (saturday) at 631-287-2433. I will be back
> in nyc tomorrow night
> (212-245-3774). I am going to dallas sunday night
> and returning to nyc
> monday night. If you are around next week, I'd like
> to stop by for an hour
> to catch up. Please let me know when.
> --------------------------
> Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld
>
--------------------------------------------------------
>
